title: ostrya japonica
intro: Ostrya japonica, also known as Japanese hop hornbeam, is a deciduous tree native to East Asia, characterized by its distinctive hop-like cones and smooth gray bark. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ostrya japonica include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Ostrya japonica can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
